mano_cua.result_summary: Bug 确认复现：decodebase64 过滤器对非法 base64 输入（http://tiddlywiki.com）抛出未捕获的 InvalidCharacterError（Failed to execute 'atob' on 'Window'），页面弹出 Internal JavaScript Error 对话框。过滤器未优雅处理无效输入。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The decodebase64 filter operator throws an uncaught InvalidCharacterError when given illegal base64 input. The error 'Failed to execute atob on Window: The string to be decoded is not correctly encoded' causes an Internal JavaScript Error dialog in TiddlyWiki. The filter should handle invalid input gracefully instead of causing unhandled exception.
